products.description: A compact, highly efficient air-to-water heat pump outdoor unit designed for quiet operation and using natural refrigerant R290.
products.others: Weight: 130 kg; Max flow temperature: 75°C; Electrical connection: 230V, 1-phase.

newsFeed.title: German Heat Pump Sales Update Q1 2025
newsFeed.summary: The latest market data shows a continued shift towards propane (R290) heat pumps in residential buildings as GEG regulations take full effect. Sales have stabilized after a volatile 2024.

newsFeed.title: BAFA Subsidy Application Process Simplified
newsFeed.summary: The Federal Office for Economic Affairs and Export Control (BAFA) has announced streamlined procedures for BEG funding applications starting this month, reducing wait times for approval.

newsFeed.title: High Temperature Heat Pumps Gaining Traction
newsFeed.summary: New models capable of 75°C flow temperatures are making heat pump retrofits viable for older unrenovated buildings without underfloor heating, driving adoption in the renovation sector.

newsFeed.title: Viessmann Expands R290 Production in Germany
newsFeed.summary: Leading manufacturer Viessmann announces a significant investment in its German production facilities to meet the soaring demand for natural refrigerant heat pumps.

newsFeed.title: Installer Shortage Remains a Bottleneck for Heat Pump Rollout
newsFeed.summary: The German Sanitation, Heating and Air Conditioning Association (ZVSHK) warns that a lack of skilled installers is the primary obstacle to achieving national heating transition goals.

newsFeed.title: R290 vs. R32: A Technical Deep Dive for Installers
newsFeed.summary: A new technical guide from the Fraunhofer Institute for Solar Energy Systems ISE analyzes the pros and cons of R290 (propane) and R32 refrigerants in residential applications.

newsFeed.title: BWP Demands Stable Policy Framework to Secure Investments
newsFeed.summary: The German Heat Pump Association (BWP) has called on the government to provide long-term stability in funding and regulation to encourage further investment in manufacturing and training.

newsFeed.title: Major Distributors Report Shifting Stock Priorities
newsFeed.summary: Wholesale distributors like GC-Gruppe are adjusting their inventory to prioritize monobloc and high-temperature heat pumps, reflecting changing installer and consumer demand.

newsFeed.title: Berlin Apartment Block Successfully Retrofitted with Heat Pumps
newsFeed.summary: A flagship renovation project in Berlin demonstrates the successful implementation of a cascaded air-source heat pump system in a multi-family building from the 1960s.

newsFeed.title: Smart Grid Integration: Heat Pumps as Virtual Batteries
newsFeed.summary: A pilot project in Bavaria is testing how a network of smart, grid-connected heat pumps can help stabilize the electrical grid by adjusting consumption based on renewable energy availability.

newsFeed.title: Geothermal Drilling Costs and Availability in 2025
newsFeed.summary: While air-source heat pumps dominate the market, a new analysis explores the current costs, geological suitability, and specialized labor market for geothermal probes in Germany.

newsFeed.title: Market Forecast: 500,000 Heat Pumps Annually by 2026?
newsFeed.summary: A market study by Agora Energiewende predicts that Germany is on track to meet its ambitious targets for heat pump installations, provided the political and economic conditions remain favorable.

policySummary.title: GEG 2025 Overview
policySummary.summary: The Building Energy Act (GEG) requires every newly installed heating system to run on at least 65% renewable energy. Heat pumps are the standard solution to meet this requirement.
